docket_entries.description: PETITION (TRANSACTION ID # 100223548) FILED BY PETITIONER BROADCAST MUSIC INC. AS TO RESPONDENT SENSORIA LLC AND DBA DNA LOUNGE

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE FEB-29-2024 HEARING RE: PETITIONER BROADCAST MUSIC INC.'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD AS JUDGMENT, THE COURT CONTINUES THE MATTER TO APRIL 25, 2024, AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 302. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER BROADCAST MUSIC INC. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT SENSORIA LLC AND DBA DNA LOUNGE $36,999.54 PRINCIPAL, $2,736.00 INTEREST, $575.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $40,310.54, SEE SCANNED "JUDGMENT"

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE APRIL-25-2024 HEARING RE: PETITIONER BROADCAST MUSIC INC.'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD AS JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER'S UNOPPOSED "PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD AS JUDGMENT" IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award As Judgment; Memorandum Of Law
Off Calendar Apr-25-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER BROADCAST MUSIC INC.'s Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award As Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner's unopposed "petition to confirm contractual arbitration award as judgment" is granted.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award As Judgment; Memorandum Of Law
Off Calendar Feb-29-2024 Continued To Apr-25-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. TIMOTHY AIRES, Esq. of Aires Law Firm (Tel: 949-718-2020) for Petitioner.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PETITIONER BROADCAST MUSIC INC.'s Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award As Judgment.

Matter discussed. Counsel Aires requests a continuance, as Respondent has not been served. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court continues the matter to April 25, 2024, at 9:30 A.M. in Department 302.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
